title: North Holland
tourism_note: Home to Amsterdam and some of the most popular nightlife and tourist destinations in the Netherlands. A hotspot for international visitors and celebrations.

title: South Holland
tourism_note: The most densely populated province in the Netherlands, featuring major cities like Rotterdam and The Hague with strong nightlife and event demand.

title: Utrecht
tourism_note: Central province of the Netherlands known for its historic city center, vibrant nightlife and excellent accessibility from all directions.

title: North Brabant
tourism_note: Southern province famous for its party culture, festivals and lively cities like Eindhoven and Breda.

title: Gelderland
tourism_note: The largest province in the Netherlands featuring vibrant cities and scenic countryside perfect for private events and group celebrations.

title: Limburg
tourism_note: A unique southern province with strong nightlife culture and international visitors thanks to Maastricht.

title: Overijssel
tourism_note: Eastern province known for lively student cities and charming historic town centers.

title: Flevoland
tourism_note: The youngest province in the Netherlands, close to Amsterdam and popular for private events and celebrations.

title: Friesland
tourism_note: Northern province known for its unique culture, lakes and historic cities attracting domestic tourism.

title: Groningen
tourism_note: A lively student province centered around the energetic city of Groningen with a vibrant nightlife scene.

title: Drenthe
tourism_note: A quieter northern province known for nature, historic villages and relaxed celebrations.

title: Zeeland
tourism_note: Coastal province famous for seaside tourism, beach towns and summer celebrations.
